columns.extraction_plan: Extract the regimen for the experimental arm from the "PURPOSE" section of the abstract on page 1: "darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel." The darolutamide arm is the experimental arm. Further confirmation is found in the "Trial Design" section on page 2: "Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel."
